title: JavaScript Objects Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of creating and manipulating JavaScript objects.

questions.question: Which of the following is correct syntax for creating a JavaScript object as a literal?
options: const person = new Json({ name: "John", age: 30 })

questions.question: Which of the following is used to access an object property?
In a method, what does 'this' refer to?
options: The parent object of the method.

questions.question: What does Object.keys(obj) return?
options: The properties of the object as an array of strings.
The values of the object's properties as an array.
A string of all property names.
An integer count of the property numbers.

questions.question: How can you add a new property 'color' with value 'red' to an existing object 'car'?
